_comment: Custom HubSpot Line Item properties. Because line-item<->line-item associations are READ-ONLY / disallowed in HubSpot, the machine->options tree is expressed with these grouping properties instead. POST each to /crm/v3/properties/line_items. groupName 'lineiteminformation'.

properties.name: machine_group
properties.label: Machine Group
properties._note: Groups a machine line item with its option line items within a deal, e.g. 'IF-C5140 #1'. Fleet-wide items use line_role=Fleet and no machine_group.
